description:
Court record: debt quittance. Sitt al-Sāda bt. Mukhtār releases someone in her own name, that of her husband Makhlūf Neʾeman ha-Yeshiva and of her son Abū l-Fakhr b. Makhlūf (who testifies himself). Hand of Natan b. Shemuʾel he-ḥaver (fl. 1128–1164 CE). (Information from Goitein's index card and CUDL.) 

On verso there are Hebrew notes relating to ʿorla ('uncircumcised fruit', i.e. the prohibition against eating fruit from young trees).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
